summary: TWO_COLUMN Rayleigh quotient for A=[[3, 1], [1, 2]] (λ≈3.618, 1.382). LEFT NumberPlane with BLUE unit circle + RED min-λ and GREEN max-λ eigenvector dashes + YELLOW rotating x arrow + ORANGE Ax/2 arrow. RIGHT axes with YELLOW R(θ)=x^T A x curve, dashed λ references. ValueTracker theta_tr sweeps 0→2π; live θ, R(x).
